markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 646. Motor Transp. Brokers
##### § 646.004 — Criminal Offense

(a) A person commits an offense if the person fails to provide the bond required by Section 646.003 (Bond Required) .

(b) An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.153(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*
